overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character jogging through the streets of Night City on a sunny day. The character moves along sidewalks and crosses intersections beneath elevated railway tracks, with the iconic Arasaka Tower visible in the distance throughout the journey.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated railway sidewalk with industrial backdrop

agents.ego_description: jogging along the sidewalk beneath elevated railway tracks, following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in denim vest walking ahead on the sidewalk, later passed by ego

entered.detail: rusted yellow steel railway trestle with multiple support columns
silver metal railing running along the left side of the walkway
tall dark gray building with horizontal lines and glass sections
iconic cylindrical mega-structure with multiple rings, dominating the skyline
illuminated advertisement screen on the left building facade

segments.scene_description: The character begins jogging along a concrete sidewalk beneath elevated railway tracks in a futuristic urban environment. The Arasaka Tower looms in the distance while a metal safety barrier lines the left side of the path. Sparse pedestrian traffic moves in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area between commercial and industrial districts

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the full height of the dark monolithic building on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing forward while passing a pedestrian in a yellow jacket, then glancing upward at the towering building

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket and white pants walking in the opposite direction, passing ego

entered.detail: concrete industrial structure with large white '06' painted on the facade

segments.scene_description: The character passes a pedestrian in a yellow jacket while the camera tilts up to emphasize the scale of the dark monolithic building on the left. The industrial building marked '06' comes into view on the right as the character transitions between districts.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with storage tanks and warehouse buildings

events.description: white van drives past from right to left across the field of view

agents.ego_description: running along the street edge, moving past industrial structures while vehicles pass by on the road

notable_agents.action: white delivery van driving along the road from right to left

entered.detail: large cylindrical industrial storage tanks situated beside the railway structure
large industrial building with green corrugated metal siding and red-white stripes

segments.scene_description: The character moves through an industrial zone featuring large white storage tanks and the building marked '06'. A white van passes by on the street as the green warehouse building comes into view. The elevated railway structure remains prominent on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: mixed commercial street with storefronts and pedestrian traffic

events.description: pedestrian density increases significantly as the character approaches the intersection

agents.ego_description: slowing to a walk while navigating through increased pedestrian traffic on the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white outfit walking toward the camera, passing by on the left

entered.detail: tall palm tree situated near the green warehouse building
modern street lamp with orange illuminated bar light
widening of the street and sidewalk indicating approach to major intersection

segments.scene_description: The character enters a busier commercial area with increased pedestrian density. The green warehouse building with its distinctive red and white stripes dominates the right side, while a modern dark building reappears on the left. Palm trees and modern street lamps line the approach to a major intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with crosswalks and traffic signals

events.description: character crosses the street at the intersection while vehicles wait at the traffic light

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection crosswalk while navigating around other pedestrians and observing the traffic

notable_agents.action: black sedan and other vehicles waiting at the red traffic light at the intersection

entered.detail: marked pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt at the intersection
tall traffic signal pole with multiple lights and street signs
low-rise commercial buildings with various signs and awnings

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a busy intersection, navigating through the crosswalk while vehicles wait at the traffic light. The Arasaka Tower remains the dominant landmark ahead, while storefront buildings line the right side of the street. The elevated railway structure recedes into the background as the character continues deeper into the city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic urban landscape that transitions from a stark industrial corridor into a bustling commercial district. It begins with the character jogging along a concrete sidewalk beneath elevated railway tracks, with the Arasaka Tower looming in the distance behind a metal safety barrier. As the character passes a pedestrian in a yellow jacket, the camera tilts upward to emphasize a dark monolithic building before shifting toward an industrial zone featuring large white storage tanks and a building marked 06. The scene then expands into a busier area where a green warehouse with red and white stripes gives way to palm trees and modern street lamps. Finally, the camera follows the character across a busy intersection through a crowded crosswalk, moving past storefronts as the railway structure recedes and the Arasaka Tower remains the dominant landmark ahead.
